student_reviews.pros: Incredible entrepreneurial ecosystem, passionate and humble classmates, great school resources, access to entire MIT ecosystem
student_reviews.cons: Emphasis on in-person classes/lack of flexibility for recruiting, limited leadership curriculum

student_reviews.pros: Exceptional support for career change, top 2-3 cultures among MBA programs, outstanding placement in consulting and tech, access to entire MIT ecosystem
student_reviews.cons: Limited leadership curriculum, less focus on general management, some top finance firms don't recruit due to smaller student body

student_reviews.pros: Amazing social life, incredible networking opportunities, top finance professors, strong entrepreneurial culture, amazing classmates
